channel.title: Code-Fable on Mingjian's Silicon World
channel.description: Recent content in Code-Fable on Mingjian's Silicon World

item.title: Code Fable: The Art of Concurrency
item.description: A code fable about concurrency, exploring the philosophy of parallel computing and the elegance of Go.

item.title: Code Fable: The Wisdom of Memory Management
item.description: A code fable about memory management, exploring the philosophy and wisdom of resource allocation.
